图片生成配置.说明: 通义万相采用异步API：先提交任务获取task_id，再轮询获取结果。支持中文prompt，对新中式风格理解更佳。

通用基础prompt.正面提示: high fashion editorial photography, professional lighting, clean composition, aesthetic, visually stunning, high quality, 4K, detailed textures
通用基础prompt.负面提示: blurry, low quality, distorted, ugly, deformed, text, watermark, logo, bad anatomy, bad proportions
通用基础prompt.小红书风格: xiaohongshu aesthetic, soft warm tones, lifestyle photography, instagram-worthy, pinterest aesthetic

Offduty.prompt_base: effortless chic street style, off-duty model look, casual yet fashionable, neutral tones, relaxed posture, urban background, natural daylight
Offduty.色调: neutral warm tones, beige, cream, camel
Offduty.场景: city streets, coffee shop exterior, minimalist architecture

Softfit.prompt_base: soft and gentle outfit, pastel color palette, flowing fabrics, dreamy atmosphere, soft natural lighting, feminine and elegant
Softfit.色调: soft pastels, cream white, light pink, lavender
Softfit.场景: indoor natural light, flower garden, soft background

空气感叠穿.prompt_base: layered outfit with sheer fabrics, airy and light layering, translucent materials, dimensional styling, flowing movement
空气感叠穿.色调: light and airy, white, light grey, soft blue
空气感叠穿.场景: minimalist interior, open space, wind-blown movement

Staycation.prompt_base: resort vacation outfit, relaxed luxury, tropical or coastal setting, sun-kissed glow, laid-back elegance, vacation vibes
Staycation.色调: warm golden, sunset tones, earth tones, sea blue
Staycation.场景: beach resort, tropical garden, pool side, sunset terrace

叛逆学院风.prompt_base: dark academia meets punk, preppy style with rebellious twist, plaid and leather mix, moody lighting, confident attitude
叛逆学院风.色调: dark tones, burgundy, navy, forest green, black
叛逆学院风.场景: old library, gothic architecture, vintage classroom, ivy-covered walls

Sportique.prompt_base: athletic fashion, sporty chic outfit, athleisure luxury, dynamic pose, modern fitness aesthetic, sleek and functional
Sportique.色调: monochrome, neon accents, clean white, sport grey
Sportique.场景: modern gym, rooftop, urban park, sport facility

新中式穿搭.prompt_base: modern Chinese style fashion, traditional Chinese elements with contemporary design, mandarin collar, silk fabrics, oriental patterns, elegant and sophisticated
新中式穿搭.色调: ink wash colors, jade green, porcelain blue, cinnabar red, rice paper white
新中式穿搭.场景: Chinese garden, bamboo grove, traditional teahouse, calligraphy studio, moongate

国潮文化.prompt_base: Chinese streetwear, traditional motifs on modern silhouettes, bold graphics with Chinese calligraphy, dragon or phoenix elements, cultural fusion fashion
国潮文化.色调: bold red, gold, black, vibrant contrast
国潮文化.场景: modern Chinese city, neon lights with traditional elements, cultural landmark

茶道美学.prompt_base: tea ceremony aesthetic outfit, serene and elegant, traditional Chinese tea setting, zen atmosphere, natural materials, mindful lifestyle
茶道美学.色调: earthy tones, bamboo green, warm wood, tea amber
茶道美学.场景: tea room, Japanese-Chinese garden, wooden tea table, ceramic tea set

香道美学.prompt_base: incense ceremony aesthetic, oriental elegance, wisps of smoke, meditative atmosphere, refined and spiritual, traditional incense tools
香道美学.色调: smoky grey, sandalwood brown, deep purple, muted gold
香道美学.场景: incense room, zen space, traditional wooden interior, soft candlelight

书法美学.prompt_base: calligraphy studio aesthetic, ink and brush elements, scholarly elegance, traditional Chinese study room, intellectual charm, artistic atmosphere
书法美学.色调: ink black, rice paper white, vermillion red, stone grey
书法美学.场景: calligraphy studio, traditional study room, ink stone and brush, scrolls

封面图规则.要求: 封面图必须最具视觉冲击力，构图完整，人物居中或三分构图，背景简洁不杂乱
封面图规则.prompt_suffix: cover image, eye-catching, bold composition, centered subject, clean background, magazine cover quality

分配: 穿搭细节特写（面料/配饰）
场景互动（喝茶/写字/走路等）
内页图规则.prompt_suffix: detailed fashion photography, lifestyle shot, editorial quality

图片比例说明.小红书推荐: 9:16 竖版（720*1280）最适合小红书展示，宽高必须在 512-1440 之间
图片比例说明.尺寸限制: 宽高必须在 512-1440 之间，否则 API 会返回 InvalidParameter 错误
